title: sv.messaging.send.input
description: Input for sv.messaging.send — a one-way message-delivery tool (ADR-0049). It durably places one message in the target's mailbox; it does NOT wait for or return the recipient's reply. A reply, if any, arrives later as a separate message on the thread. The platform delivers messages, it does not orchestrate.

address.description: Canonical scheme:no-dash-hex address of the target — an agent://, unit://, or human:// address in the caller's tenant.

message.description: The message payload to deliver to the target. Opaque to the platform; a JSON string or object.

reason.description: Optional rationale recorded verbatim on the MessageSent activity. Never the model's hidden chain-of-thought.
